narrative:
Strongsville City Sd city school district has 33,353 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.1% D−R vs -6.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
